name: CFSC Checks Cashed Cesar Chavez & National
description_short: Community Financial Service Centers (CFSC) operates check-cashing and financial services across multiple U.S. locations. The Cesar Chavez & National branch serves the National City, California area.
description_long: Community Financial Service Centers (CFSC) is a multi-location financial services provider specializing in check-cashing and related financial products for underbanked consumers. The company operates branches across major metropolitan areas including Chicago, New York, Los Angeles, San Diego, and Denver, with the Cesar Chavez & National location serving the National City area in Southern California. CFSC serves consumers who need quick access to cash and basic financial services without traditional banking relationships. The company offers check-cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services at numerous physical locations. CFSC distinguishes itself through widespread geographic availability across high-density urban markets and Spanish-language service capability in many locations, reflecting its service to diverse communities. The company's extensive branch network—spanning 40+ cities—provides convenient access for customers who prefer face-to-face transactions. However, the website provided contains only a location finder and generates 404 errors, limiting visibility into current fee structures, specific service offerings, hours of operation, or product details for the Cesar Chavez & National location. Consumers should contact the branch directly or visit in person to obtain accurate pricing and service information.
address: 801 S César E. Chávez Dr, Milwaukee, WI 53204

company_info.headquarters: 801 S César E. Chávez Dr, Milwaukee, WI 53204

pros: Extensive multi-state branch network with 40+ locations across major cities
Serves underbanked communities with convenient physical access points
Operating in Spanish-language markets including California, New York, and Illinois locations
Long-established company with presence in high-density urban areas
Offers multiple service types beyond check-cashing (wire transfers, money orders, bill payment)
No minimum account balance or credit requirements for services
cons: Website does not display current fee schedules or pricing information
Limited online presence and digital service options; primarily branch-based
Specific location information for Cesar Chavez & National branch is not accessible via provided URL
No readily available information about hours, contact details, or service limitations
Check-cashing inherently more expensive than traditional banking for frequent users
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing immediate check conversion to cash
Small business owners requiring wire transfers and money order services
Bilingual Spanish-speakers in urban markets seeking accessible financial services
Consumers without bank accounts who need basic payment processing services
diagnosis: CFSC Checks Cashed is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers in urban areas who need quick check-cashing and basic payment services. The primary limitation is that the website provides minimal operational details; prospective customers must visit the branch or call directly to confirm current hours, fee structures, and specific services available at the Cesar Chavez & National location.
